ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modal_configurations" (
  "modal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modal popup */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the modal trigger link */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the modal popup */,
  "size" TEXT /* Optional modal size (lg, sm) */,
  "xclass" TEXT /* Any extra classes added to the trigger link for styling */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data attribute and value pairs separated by a comma. Pairs separated by pipe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the modal configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the modal configuration was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the modal (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modal_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "modal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modal popup where the content will be displayed */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of the content (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Text content to be displayed */,
  "content_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image content */,
  "content_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video content */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the content within the modal */,
  "content_metadata" TEXT /* Metadata about the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modal_content_modal_id FOREIGN KEY ("modal_id") REFERENCES modal_configurations ("modal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "modal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modal popup interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., open, close, submit) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the user's device */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL from which the user interacted with the modal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_modal_id FOREIGN KEY ("modal_id") REFERENCES modal_configurations ("modal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modal_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "modal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modal popup */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views of the modal popup */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions with the modal popup */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate (percentage of interactions leading to a desired action) */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate (percentage of users who leave after interacting with the modal) */,
  "time_on_modal" REAL /* Average time users spend on the modal (seconds) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modal_analytics_modal_id FOREIGN KEY ("modal_id") REFERENCES modal_configurations ("modal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modal_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the modal popup */,
  "modal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modal popup */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the modal popup */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the modal trigger link */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the modal popup */,
  "size" TEXT /* Optional modal size (lg, sm) */,
  "xclass" TEXT /* Any extra classes added to the trigger link for styling */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data attribute and value pairs separated by a comma. Pairs separated by pipe */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content in the modal version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modal_versions_modal_id FOREIGN KEY ("modal_id") REFERENCES modal_configurations ("modal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "content_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of the content (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Text content to be displayed */,
  "content_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image content */,
  "content_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES modal_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modal_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "template_content" TEXT /* Content of the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modal_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modal_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group membership */,
  "modal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modal popup */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modal_group_memberships_modal_id FOREIGN KEY ("modal_id") REFERENCES modal_configurations ("modal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modal_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES modal_groups ("group_id")
)
